category_sources: source_facts.description says ASGI web server; official Uvicorn docs describe it as an ASGI web server for Python.
display_name_sources: Official Uvicorn documentation uses the display name Uvicorn.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Uvicorn documentation URL; official docs also list Documentation: https://uvicorn.dev.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Uvicorn docs list Source Code as https://www.github.com/Kludex/uvicorn.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an ASGI web server; official Uvicorn docs describe ASGI, Python, HTTP, and WebSocket support.
